reviews.author: Om Gupta
reviews.review_body: This  school teacher does care about children and teacher say what we can do in 1 hr and asked parent to teach at home.Achadmic is very poor. Think a situation where parrent is illiterate  and do not have time being in IT industry then their child will not study then what is meaning of school  .Most of the school also have similar things but not like this school.

reviews.author: Pretty Scarlet
reviews.review_body: RGS is a good school. In my short experience, I have found that it meets my expectations as a parent. Their student centric approach helps overall development of the children. Teachers are very well trained and are compassionate towards their students. Thanks to the whole staff of RGS for their good work!

reviews.author: Peehu Singh
reviews.review_body: Recently I attended my child's Kid fit Day at Raghav Global School. And it was a superb experience. Everything was very well organized by the teachers and the staff. There was no chaos and I and my husband were truly delighted to see our son performing so well. My son studies in Prep Aster and his teacher Ms. Pallavi was encouraging not only him but all the children with so much zeal and love. The Yoga was wonderfully executed by the children. Really want to thank all the teachers for putting so much effort and labor into our kids. It really showed up.

reviews.author: akash singh
reviews.review_body:
This school is good because of hardworking and talented teacher's. They build a good bond with child thereby child is free to ask their questions. They also believe to educate child with various activities. My daughter is studying in Nursery(Daffodil) class and very happy to go school. I want to give thanks to Mrs. Deepthi Mahesh Ma'am(class teacher). Good luck..

Happy parents..

reviews.author: Anmol Puri
reviews.review_body:
Choosing Raghav Global School for my child’s education was the right choice.Everyday my child is looking forward coming to school.
The school ensures the overall development of children. Teachers are wonderful and well qualified . They pay equal attention to every kids which is the best part of this school. I would highly recommend all parents to opt for this school.
